name: Document Version Control
description: Tracks changes to Master Orchestrator and module spec documents, enforces character/length targets, and notifies governance channel.

config.description: Extract commit details and calculate document metrics
config.code: const commitMsg = inputData.commit_message; const filesChanged = inputData.files_changed; const additions = parseInt(inputData.additions); const deletions = parseInt(inputData.deletions); const netChange = additions - deletions; output = { commit_message: commitMsg, files_changed: filesChanged, additions: additions, deletions: deletions, net_change: netChange, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() };

config.message: Document Update | {{step1.files_changed}} | {{step1.commit_message}} | Net change: {{step1.net_change}} chars | Branch: {{branch_name}}
